mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_id NOT IN (SELECT member_id FROM admin_detail)

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'MM')) AS month, NVL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS amount FROM payment WHERE TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND pay_status = 'PAID' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'MM')
SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'MM')) AS month, NVL(SUM(refund_amount), 0) AS amount FROM refund WHERE TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'MM')
SELECT MOD(TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(created_at, 'D')) + 5, 7) AS day_index, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'D')
SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(last_login, 'HH24')) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM member WHERE last_login IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_CHAR(last_login, 'HH24')

SELECT '#' || r.res_no AS resNo, g.name AS guestName, s.space_name AS spaceName, TO_CHAR(r.res_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || LPAD(r.start_time, 2, '0') || ':00' AS resDate, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN '예약완료' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '취소됨' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '이용완료' WHEN 'NOSHOW' THEN '노쇼' ELSE r.status END AS status, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN '#34E085' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '#EF4444' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '#3B82F6' ELSE '#6C757D' END AS statusColor FROM reservation r JOIN guest_detail g ON r.guest_id = g.member_id JOIN space_unit su ON r.unit_no = su.unit_no JOIN space s ON su.space_no = s.space_no ORDER BY r.res_no DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
